name: _DoIP_MessageAcknowledgeInd
title: _DoIP_MessageAcknowledgeInd
syntax: void _DoIP_MessageAcknowledgeInd( WORD payloadType, long ackCode, WORD testerAddress, WORD ecuAddress);
description: A positive or negative acknowledgment was received in the tester. The code may provide additional information on the reason for a negative acknowledge.

parameters.name: payloadType
parameters.description: ISO13400 0x8002: Diagnostic message positive acknowledgment 0x8003: Diagnostic message negative acknowledgment HSFZ 0x02: positive acknowledgment 0x40..0xFF: negative acknowledgment (different reasons) other reserved

parameters.name: ackCode
parameters.description: Response code transported in the acknowledgment, or -1 for HSFZ. -1: not available, i.e. HSFZ does not send a code 0: OK (ISO 13400 positive acknowledgment) 2..8: Not OK (ISO 13400 negative acknowledgment) other reserved

parameters.name: testerAddress
parameters.description: Logical address of the tester the acknowledgment is directed to.

parameters.name: ecuAddress
parameters.description: Logical address of the entity that sends the acknowledgment.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
